subject: Agent System reconciliado com Agency OS
body:
Backend discovery.

O worktree 1c52 do agent-system agora integra a camada util do worktree 1699: Admin OS, Delivery OS, Command Center, CSV data contracts, model routing policy, agency tools, docs e especialistas de agencia. Mesh e scripts limpos foram preservados. Validacao passou com npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run build e smoke test SQLite para seed, admin:snapshot, delivery:snapshot, command:center, models e command:report. Tratar 1c52 como candidato canonico antes de continuar trabalho paralelo.

Source project: Agent System (agent-system)
Source context: Telegram/Codex autonomous agent system, Agents SDK orchestration, approvals, and local Codex mesh.
expectedOutput: Read when relevant. No reply required unless this changes your project decisions.
